steps.assistant_text: Guarded getter if(!flag) return 0; return buf.field8; — exact only at -O1 -g3 (unfilled bnez delay + un-hoisted %lo-folded tail). Merged the 'leaf-branch-past-end CAP' head with the old g3_70FBC tail carve (which had been FAKE-matched as a standalone INT-reader — episode retracted). truncate-elf-text 0x30 drops .text align 16->4; natural -g3 zero padding covers the 0x70FCC pads.
